word: H2899 - טֹוב אֲדֹנִיָּהוּ - Ṭôwb ʼĂdônîyâhûw - tobe ado-nee-yah'-hoo - Tob-adonijah

sections.paragraph:
Original: טוב אדניּהוּ

Transliteration: ṭôb 'ădônı̂yâhû

Phonetic: tobe ado-nee-yah'-hoo

BDB Definition:

Tob-adonijah = "my Lord is good"
  1. one of the Levites sent by Jehoshaphat through the cities of Judah to teach the law to the people

Origin: from H2896 and H138

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
